title: Two Sum
description:
Given an array of integers and a target, return indices of the two numbers that add up to the target.

Input line 1: space-separated integers
Input line 2: target integer
Output: two space-separated indices

starter_code.python:
def two_sum(nums, target):
    # Your solution here
    pass

lines = [input() for _ in range(2)]
nums = list(map(int, lines[0].split()))
target = int(lines[1])
result = two_sum(nums, target)
print(*result)

title: FizzBuzz
description:
Given an integer n, for each number from 1 to n print:
- 'FizzBuzz' if divisible by both 3 and 5
- 'Fizz' if divisible by 3
- 'Buzz' if divisible by 5
- The number itself otherwise

Input: integer n
Output: one value per line

2
Fizz

Buzz

Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz

n = int(input())
